name: Recipe Community
description: Recipe sharing and food community app with browsable feed, recipe detail pages, creation tools, and user profiles.

pages.notes: Recipe feed: filter bar for cuisine, dietary tags, and sort; content card grid with recipe photos, titles, and ratings
Recipe detail: hero with photo, title, cook time, and ingredients; comment thread for community discussion and tips
Recipe creation: structured form sections for title, ingredients, steps, and tags; content uploader for photos
User profile: creator profile header with avatar, bio, and stats; content card grid of their published recipes

page_briefs.feed: Filter bar at top with cuisine type chips (Italian, Mexican, Asian, etc.), dietary filters (vegetarian, gluten-free), difficulty level, and sort by (popular, recent, rating). Below, a responsive content card grid with large food photography, recipe title, cook time, difficulty badge, rating stars, and author avatar.
page_briefs.recipe-detail: Content detail hero with full-width food photo, recipe title, author info, cook time, servings, and difficulty. Below the fold: ingredients list, step-by-step instructions with optional step photos. Comment thread at the bottom for tips, modifications, and community photos.
page_briefs.create: Structured form sections: basic info (title, description, cuisine), ingredients (dynamic add/remove rows), instructions (numbered steps with optional photo per step), metadata (cook time, servings, difficulty, dietary tags). Content uploader for the hero photo and step images with drag-and-drop.
page_briefs.profile: Creator profile header with avatar, display name, bio, follower/following counts, and total recipes. Below, a content card grid of their published recipes with the same card format as the feed. Tabs or filter for published, drafts, and saved recipes.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with category links and main content area
